query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a room interior with a seated person near a window covered by horizontal blinds and framed by tied-back curtains. Several potted plants rest on the windowsill, and a textured fabric is visible in the lower left foreground. Strong backlighting from the window illuminates the blinds and plants while the figure and surrounding interior remain largely unlit.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A deliberately underexposed black and white photograph conveying atmospheric distress, showing a solitary figure reduced to near-total silhouette beside a blown-out window with horizontal blinds and tied-back curtains. Potted plants on the windowsill and a textured fabric in the foreground emerge from oppressive crushed shadows, creating a heavy, melancholic mood of isolation.
